name: @wyrmkeep/jetkvm-mcp
description: Production-safe computer-use MCP server for one operator-configured JetKVM
author: WyrmKeep

scripts.test:task1: vitest run src/domain.test.ts src/errors.test.ts src/runtimePolicy.test.ts src/deviceLease.test.ts src/deviceLeaseRunner.test.ts
scripts.test:phase2: vitest run src/config.test.ts src/domain.test.ts src/errors.test.ts src/browser/auth.test.ts src/observability/logger.test.ts src/mcp/toolCatalogue.test.ts src/mcp/schemas.test.ts src/mcp/results.test.ts src/mcp/server.test.ts src/mcp/stdio.test.ts src/mcp/legacySse.test.ts src/session/deviceSessionClient.test.ts src/idempotency/RequestLedger.test.ts src/device/DeviceRpcAdapter.test.ts src/test-support/PlaneSeams.test.ts src/test-support/DeviceRpcTestSupport.test.ts src/test-support/ReplayPlanes.test.ts src/stories/manifest.test.ts && node --test scripts/check-docs-consistency.test.mjs
scripts.test:phase3: vitest run src/browser/bridgeProtocol.test.ts src/browser/BrowserController.test.ts src/browser/frames.test.ts src/browser/geometry.test.ts src/handlers/inputDisplay.matrix.test.ts src/native/JetKvmNativeControlPlane.test.ts src/planes/JetKvmBrowserPlane.test.ts src/test-support/PlaneSeams.test.ts src/test-support/ReplayPlanes.test.ts src/test-support/uiFixture.test.ts src/stories/manifest.test.ts src/stories/phase3.acceptance.test.ts && node --test scripts/check-docs-consistency.test.mjs
scripts.test:phase4: vitest run src/ToolHandlers.test.ts src/handlers/power.test.ts src/runtime.test.ts src/cli.test.ts src/handlers/inputDisplay.matrix.test.ts src/handlers/powerSession.matrix.test.ts src/session/SessionService.test.ts src/session/deviceSessionClient.test.ts && npm run smoke:installed-first-party
